title: medicago minima subvar. elongata
intro: Medicago minima subvar. elongata, also known as small bird's-foot trefoil or narrowleaf medick, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Medicinal preparations of Medicago minima subvar. elongata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
